forecasts.short: Chance Rain And Snow Showers then Mostly Clear
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain and snow showers before 8pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 29. West wind 0 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Clear
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 7pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 32. West wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

A chance of rain showers before 8pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 30. West wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Slight Chance Rain And Snow Showers then Partly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: Rain showers likely before 9pm, then a slight chance of rain and snow showers between 9pm and 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 32. West wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
Mostly clear, with a low around 32. Southwest wind 2 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

forecasts.short: Partly Cloudy then Scattered Snow Showers
forecasts.detailed: Scattered snow showers after 4am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 34. West wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.
